title: Shower-Head-Universal-1.6M-Hose-with-Holder-Set-Replacement, BauTangLe 2024 Upgraded Shower Head, Enjoy 5 Settings for Showers
features: 【5 Settings for Showers】Five different spray settings to choose, easy to adjust. Ideal for every families including little ones.

【Fit Easily and Lightweight】BauTangLe shower head fits any hose and only takes a few minutes to install. It's made of eco-friendly ABS material, elegant polished chrome finish, super lightweight and not possible to rust.

【Universal Hose】Hose in this set fits any shower head and mixer end. Impossible to leak, break or rust, because of its super anti-leak washers, copper connectors, flexibility, high standard EPDM material and nice polished chrome finish. Also it's 61 inches long and enough to most families.

【One Set One Gift】Shower head holder comes included as a gift in this BauTangLe Shower Set. It's fixed using screws that come with the holder, not sticky glue which easy to fail, very strong and robust. Easy to install, especially if the drill holes are there already.

【What You Get】BauTangLe Shower Head, Universal 61 inches (160 cm) Hose with 2 pcs Washers, One Gift (Shower Head Holder and Accessories), 10 Years Quality Warranty and Reply-within-24-Hours Customer Service Every Day.
description: Product Description 5 SETTINGS FOR SHOWERS - Five different spray settings to choose, easy to adjust, from an extremely powerful shower to a nice gentle flow. Ideal for every families including little ones. FIT EASILY AND LIGHTWEIGHT - BauTangLe shower head fits any hose and only takes a few minutes to install. It's made of upgraded ABS material, elegant polished chrome finish, super lightweight and not possible to rust. UNIVERSAL HOSE - Hose in this set fits any shower head and mixer end. Impossible to leak, break or rust, because of its super anti-leak washers, copper connectors, flexibility, high standard EPDM material and nice polished chrome finish. Also it's 61 inches long and enough to most families. ONE SET ONE GIFT - Shower head holder comes included as a gift in this BauTangLe Shower Set. It's fixed using screws that come with the holder, not sticky glue which easy to fail, very strong and robust. Easy to install, especially if the drill holes are there already. WHAT YOU GET - BauTangLe Shower Head, Universal 61 inches (160 cm) Hose with 2 pcs Washers, One Gift (Shower Head Holder and Accessories). .
